title: Robust Saudi Arabian Jumbo Shrimp Pilaf
description: A one-pot Saudi Arabian dish featuring jumbo shrimp, cooked in a ttukbaegi earthenware pot and served on a talavera plate, with a nutty and bouncy texture, this ayurvedic rajasic friendly meal is perfect for dinner.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large ttukbaegi earthenware pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the basmati rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pot, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the jumbo shrimp and cook for 5 minutes, or until they are pink and cooked through.
Serve the pilaf on a talavera plate, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
